task: Spotlight Board UI diverged from design frame B.7 (MoMorph MaZUn5xHXZ, node 2940:14174): count was gold+white split instead of all-white 36px centered; search pill was dark-grey instead of gold-tint rgba(255,234,158,.10) with #998C5F border; names sat inside an inner framed box instead of floating directly on the photo panel; activity was a horizontal ticker instead of a bottom-left vertical stack fading upward (14px bold, opacity 1 at newest bottom to 0.1 oldest, 6 lines); zoom controls sat bottom-left instead of the design's bottom-right corner; stacked layout made the panel ~900px instead of the fixed ~548px overlay panel. Live-recipient highlight now uses the design's red #F17676; the node field is inset so names never collide with the top band or activity stack
acceptanceCriteria: count renders as a single all-white centered line over the panel
search pill uses gold-tint background and #998C5F border, top-left overlay
activity log renders as a vertical bottom-left stack with opacity fading upward (newest bottom, opacity 1)
names float directly on the panel background with no inner framed box, inset from the top band and activity stack
e2e regression test 'panel matches design frame B.7' fails without the fix and passes with it
existing live-board behaviors intact: keyboard pan/zoom, search filter opacity semantics, realtime ticker aria (4/4 e2e pass)
vitest, tsc --noEmit, eslint (changed files), next build all pass
blastRadius: Spotlight Board panel layout and overlays
realtime activity ticker rendering and live-note toasts
contracts: SpotlightBoardLive props (initialCount, nodes, roster, initialActivity) unchanged
aria labels/roles unchanged (application role, search label, activity ticker label)
